/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/calculator.dir/calculator_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/calculator.dir/main.cpp.o -o calculator -F/Users/akatsuki/Qt/6.11.0/macos/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/akatsuki/Qt/6.11.0/macos/lib /Users/akatsuki/Qt/6.11.0/macos/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /Users/akatsuki/Qt/6.11.0/macos/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /Users/akatsuki/Qt/6.11.0/macos/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
